name: universe of the triple fracture
description:
🌌 UNIVERSE OF THE TRIPLE FRACTURE

In 2030, reality shattered.

Two moons appeared.

Three energies were born.

Three continents emerged.

Humanity ceased to be merely human.

🌍 CONTINENTS

AETERIA – Continent of Mana

Kingdoms:

Humans

Elves

Dwarves

Kitsune

Races: elves, orcs, ogres, fairies, trolls, demi-humans, barbarians, dragons.

Ancient ruins, titan corpses, sealed temples.

Here, Mana was born.

MURIM – Continent of Chi and Ki

Fusion of Chinese, Korean, and Japanese martial worlds.

Governed by:

Sects

Clans

Dojos

Martial families

Here, Chi and Ki were born.

MONSTROUS CONTINENT

Formerly: Elyndor.

Today: Absolute chaos.

They attempted to fuse Mana, Chi, and Ki.

Result: mutation, collapse, divine beasts, corrupted dragons.

Here are the secrets to destroy or reset the world.

🌙 THE THREE MOONS

Original Moon – Ancient human observatory.

Stone Moon – Seals of ancient entities.

Technological Moon – Chronarch civilization, dormant robots, forgotten AIs.

⚡ ULTIMATE POWER SYSTEM

Universal Stages:

Awakened

Opening

Channeling

Inner Forging

Mastery

Avatar

Transcendence

Higher Existence

Entity

Anomaly

Each stage: Low – Medium – High – Peak

Triple users break the system.

🏫 AETERIA MAGIC ACADEMY

Imperial Academy of Aeteria Nova

Hierarchy:

Supreme Director

Council of Archmages (7)

Tower Masters

Instructors

Assistants

Students

Towers:

Elemental
creator: Na!
